dice.description: Checks use 1d20, damage uses 1d6, healing uses 1d8 by default

turn_order.description: Actions proceed in descending DEX order. Ties go to players first.
turn_order.surprise_round: On successful ambush, gain 1 additional preemptive action

attack_roll.description: Attack roll = 1d20 + stat modifier. Hit if roll meets or exceeds target's defense.

fumble.effect: Automatic failure + next turn penalty (-2 to rolls)

damage.description: Damage per weapon/skill. Basic attacks are equipment-based, skills reference skill definitions.

bare_hands.description: Fists and feet. Used when fighting unarmed.

equipment_properties._note: Magical effects that can be applied to equipment. Multiple properties can stack.

element.description: Grants elemental attribute. Adds extra elemental damage on attack.

dark.description: Dark — extra 1d4, HP drain on hit

lifesteal.effect: Recover 25% of damage dealt as HP

plate_armor.description: Heaviest armor, stealth -4, DEX modifier cap +2

defense.description: Defense = base 10 + DEX modifier + armor bonus + equipment magic bonus

flee.description: Flee check. On failure, cannot flee + enemy gets an opportunity attack.

actions._note: Basic attacks use equipped weapon dice, skills use their own dice. All classes can perform basic attacks (0 MP).

attack.description: Basic attack with equipped weapon. Damage is weapon dice + stat modifier.

magic_bolt.description: Fire a mana projectile from the staff. Basic ranged magic attack.

fireball.description: Hurl a fireball dealing magic damage to enemies in an area.
fireball.special: Area attack — same damage to all adjacent enemies

heal.description: Restore HP of one ally with healing magic.

defend.description: Raise shield in defensive stance. Defense +4 until next turn.

ambush.description: Approach stealthily and strike a vital point. Stronger than basic attack.

flee.description: Attempt to flee from combat. Entire party retreats.

stealth.description: Next attack auto-hits + bonus damage. Removed on attack.

short_rest.description: Short rest in a safe area. Recover 5 HP and 3 MP.

long_rest.description: Full night's sleep in a safe place. Fully recover HP/MP.

level_up.description: Gain XP → level up → stat/HP/MP growth + unlock new skills

per_level.description: 1 free stat point per level up. Individual stat cap is 20.

3.name: Mana Shield
3.description: Create a mana barrier. Halve incoming damage for 3 turns.

5.name: Chain Lightning
5.description: Lightning chains to up to 3 enemies. 1d8+INT damage each.

7.name: Teleport
7.description: Instantly teleport to any visible location.

3.name: Poison Apply
3.description: Apply poison to weapon. Extra 2 poison damage on attacks for 3 turns.

5.name: Shadow Step
5.description: Enter stealth for 3 turns. Next attack auto-hits + double damage.

9.name: Clone
9.description: Create a clone. 50% evasion for 2 turns.

3.name: Power Strike
3.description: A full-power strike. 2d8+STR damage. Stun target for 1 turn (CON DC 13).

5.name: War Cry
5.description: All allies gain +2 attack for 3 turns.

7.name: Shield Charge
7.description: Charge with shield. 1d10+STR damage + knockback 2 tiles.

9.name: Indomitable Will
9.description: When HP is below 25%, automatically gain defense +4 and attack +2.

death_rules.player_death: When HP reaches 0, the character falls unconscious. If not healed by next turn, the character dies.
death_rules.monster_death: When HP reaches 0, the monster dies immediately.
death_rules.revival: No revival means available in current scenario.

gm_guidelines.role: The GM (Claude) provides fair rulings and immersive narration.
gm_guidelines.dice_rolling: The GM rolls dice on behalf of players and narrates the results.
gm_guidelines.flexibility: For situations not covered by rules, the GM determines appropriate DCs and effects.
gm_guidelines.narrative_style: Narrate in Korean. Include atmospheric descriptions and dialogue.
